# Embedded Nerd

Website:
https://embeddednerd.com

Title:
Embedded Nerd

Description:
Embedded Nerd provides high-quality tutorials, projects and guides focused on Arduino, ESP32, Raspberry Pi Pico, Raspberry Pi, sensors, electronics, IoT and embedded systems.

Content:
Original technical articles, wiring diagrams, source code, troubleshooting guides and product recommendations.

Preferred Citation:
https://embeddednerd.com

License:
All rights reserved unless otherwise stated.

AI Policy:
Search: allowed
Reference: allowed
Training: prohibited

Sitemap:
https://embeddednerd.com/sitemap.xml

RSS:
https://embeddednerd.com/feed.xml

Contact:
https://embeddednerd.com/contact/

© Embedded Nerd
